Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) The OCID of the compartment where the private endpoint is created.
  • subnet_id - (Required) The subnet OCID used for the private endpoint.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) Private endpoint display name.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) DistributedDatabasePrivateEndpoint description.
  • nsg_ids - (Optional) (Updatable) The list of network security groups attached to the private endpoint.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Simple key-value tags applied to the private endpoint.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags applied to the private endpoint.
